name: PageHeader
description: PageHeader (top-of-page header row — title + description, optional leading avatar/icon/brand, search + notification icon buttons, and secondary + primary action buttons) and SectionHeader (lighter in-page section header with tighter padding and search only, no notification bell).
sourceNote: Ported from Figma nodes 3829:27898 (Page Header [1.1]) and 3880:63403 (Section Header [1.1]). Figma's rigid 5-variant type enum (Basic / Avatar / Left Icon / Brand / Company) is collapsed into a single generic `leading` slot — stories reproduce each variant by dropping the existing Avatar / KeyIcon / PlaceholderBrand components into it, mirroring the SidebarNavigation/TopbarNavigation composition pattern. Both share one internal HeaderBar shell driven by a size discriminator (page = 20px vertical padding + notification bell, section = 16px + search only). The secondary/primary buttons use a header-local style rather than the shared Button because the Figma secondary treatment (1px soft-200 border, x-small shadow, sub-600 text) does not match any existing Button variant; the search/notification buttons reuse TopbarIconButton.
